svg.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; animation-trigger: none; fill: none; height: 16px; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 2px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible; width: 16px

rect.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; animation-trigger: none; fill: none; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 2px; transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible

path.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; animation-trigger: none; fill: none; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 2px; transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible
